offer_statement.clear_statement: I find people who are already interested in coaching, qualify them to make sure they're actually ready to buy, and book them on your calendar. You show up, they're already sold on coaching — you're just closing on you specifically.
offer_statement.what_we_do: We book qualified sales calls for fitness coaches.
offer_statement.what_we_dont_do: Run ads, build funnels, create content, coach your clients.

option_a.name: Pay-Per-Show (Performance)
option_a.structure: $[X] per qualified call that shows up
option_a.qualification_criteria: Must meet 3 criteria: intent confirmed, budget discussed, available this month
option_a.best_for: Coaches who want pure performance, no commitment

option_b.name: 14-Day Pilot (Proof Period)
option_b.if_not: I keep working at no cost until I do, or we part ways
option_b.replacement_policy: Any no-show without 24hr notice gets replaced

option_c.name: Monthly Retainer
option_c.term: Month-to-month after pilot, or 3-month commitment for discount
option_c.best_for: Coaches ready to scale, proven offer, good close rate

price_ladder.description: How to handle 'How much?' at different stages

levels.response: Good question — let me ask a few things first so I can give you an accurate number.
Depends on volume. Typically $3,500/mo, but let me look at your situation first.
For [X calls/month], it's $3,500/mo. But first — 10 free calls to prove it works. If I deliver, we talk. If not, you owe nothing.
I get it — $3,500 is real money. That's why we do free calls first. You see quality before anything changes hands.

fit_check.description: Ask these before making an offer
questions: Are you actively taking on new clients right now?
If the calls were qualified, do you have capacity to close them?
Is client acquisition a priority for you right now or something you're handling differently?
fit_check.if_no_to_any: It sounds like the timing might not be right. Want me to check back in [timeframe]?
fit_check.purpose: Avoid pitching people who aren't candidates

levels.name: Proof Period (Default)
levels.script: First 10 calls are free. You see the quality before anything else. If I can't deliver in 14 days, I keep working until I do — no cost to you.
levels.conditions: Applies to qualified calls only. Qualified = intent confirmed, budget discussed, available this month.

levels.name: Performance Guarantee
levels.script: If I don't deliver 10 qualified calls in 14 days, I keep working at no cost until I do. If at any point you're not happy with the quality, we stop and you owe nothing.
levels.when_to_use: Skeptical leads, people who've been burned before

levels.name: Full Risk Reversal (Use sparingly)
levels.script: 10 calls free. If I don't deliver, I keep going free. If you pay for a month and calls don't close at a reasonable rate, I'll work with you to fix it or refund.
levels.conditions: 'Reasonable rate' = 20%+ close rate on qualified calls.
levels.when_to_use: Only for high-value prospects who need maximum reassurance

do_say: If I don't deliver, I keep working until I do
You see results before paying anything
The risk is on me, not you
dont_say: No risk whatsoever (everything has some risk)
